Mini PRD

Problem

Engineering teams lack a structured way to capture and share product decisions with stakeholders. Context is lost in Slack threads and meeting notes, leading to repeated discussions.

Goals

  • Reduce decision re-litigation — measured by: zero "we already decided this" incidents in sprint retros.
  • Improve onboarding speed — measured by: new engineers self-sufficient in ≤2 days.

Rollout

Phase 1: internal dogfood with the pmos-toolkit team. Phase 2: broader rollout after 30-day soak.
